name: War Trance
description: War Trance permanently grants one friendly creature +1 Attack.

name: Reckless Oath
description: Reckless Oath permanently grants one friendly creature +1 Attack and +1 Missile, but reduces its maximum Loyalty by 2.

name: Radiant Burst
description: Radiant Burst permanently reduces one enemy creature's Defense by 1.

name: Dark Command
description: Dark Command permanently raises one friendly creature's maximum Loyalty by 1.

name: Unravel
description: Unravel removes every spell enchantment from one creature, friendly or enemy. Innate special abilities remain.

name: Blinding Dust
description: Blinding Dust permanently reduces one enemy creature's Attack by 1.

name: Aegis
description: Aegis permanently reduces missile and territory-fire damage against one friendly creature by 1.

name: Guiding Star
description: Guiding Star permanently grants one friendly creature +1 Missile.

name: Mend
description: Mend restores 2 current Loyalty to one friendly creature, never above its maximum.

name: Inferno
description: Inferno immediately deals 2 Loyalty damage to every creature in one enemy company.

name: Valiant Heart
description: Valiant Heart permanently grants one friendly creature +1 Attack and +1 maximum Loyalty.

name: Storm Lance
description: Storm Lance immediately deals 1 Loyalty damage to one enemy creature.

name: Arcane Mantle
description: Arcane Mantle permanently grants one friendly creature +1 Defense.

name: Great Unraveling
description: Great Unraveling removes every spell enchantment from all creatures in the selected land. Innate special abilities remain.

name: Dread Wave
description: Dread Wave permanently reduces the maximum Loyalty of every creature in one enemy company by 1.

name: Wellspring
description: Wellspring permanently grants one friendly creature a random +1 bonus to Attack, Missile or maximum Loyalty.

name: Wellspring of Might
description: Wellspring of Might is the Attack outcome of Wellspring and permanently grants +1 Attack.

name: Wellspring of Reach
description: Wellspring of Reach is the Missile outcome of Wellspring and permanently grants +1 Missile.

name: Wellspring of Vigor
description: Wellspring of Vigor is the Loyalty outcome of Wellspring and permanently grants +1 maximum Loyalty.

name: Binding Sigil
description: Binding Sigil prevents one enemy creature from acting for one battle turn.

name: Withering Mark
description: Withering Mark permanently reduces one enemy creature's Attack and Defense by 1.

name: Veil of Smoke
description: Veil of Smoke permanently reduces one enemy creature's Missile by 1, to a minimum effective value of zero.

name: Waystep
description: Waystep moves one friendly creature directly to any friendly land.

name: Essence Haze
description: Essence Haze affects every wizard and prevents ordinary spell casting and creature summoning for 3 turns.

name: Shatter Rune
description: Shatter Rune forces one rival wizard to discard a random rune during their next turn.

name: Rune Sight
description: Rune Sight reveals one rival's concealed hand to the caster for 5 turns.

name: Hush
description: Hush prevents one rival from calling Chao, Pung, Kong or Game and from casting or summoning for 3 turns. Telepaths are immune.

name: Call Number Rune
description: Call Number Rune directs your next draw to a Number rune if one remains in the wall.

name: Call Bone Rune
description: Call Bone Rune directs your next draw to a Bone rune if one remains in the wall.

name: Call Blade Rune
description: Call Blade Rune directs your next draw to a Blade rune if one remains in the wall.
